_note: This file is a design-time snapshot and may be out of date. For current step state, run: iw item-status <ID> --json. The DB is the authoritative source of truth (CR-00023).
title: Show Resolved Agent + Model Instead of "Inherit" in Step Runtime Dropdowns

steps.description: Add resolve_inherited_runtime() helper to orch/agent_runtime/resolver.py + export it; wire the 3 dashboard render paths (items.py item_detail, items.py item_tab_overview, runtime_overrides.py _render_steps_fragment) to compute and pass inherited_runtime_label; TDD resolver + dashboard tests

Replace both '— inherit —' labels in item_steps_table.html with '{{ inherited_runtime_label }} (inherited)' plus a neutral fallback; align the bulk dropdown non-empty option labels to display_name; tests/dashboard template-render test
QV: integration test suite (covers tests/integration + tests/dashboard)
QV: Browser verification — relabelled runtime dropdowns show resolved agent + model with (inherited) suffix
Self-assessment of the just-completed item via the iw-item-analyze skill
